audit_items.proof_trace: All three operator() overloads accept arguments by const reference (not pointer), so null references are impossible per C++ semantics. The only operation is lhs.owner_before(rhs), which is defined and safe on empty/null-state shared_ptr and weak_ptr objects (compares control block pointers without dereferencing them). No raw pointer dereferences (*p or p->) exist anywhere in the file.
